title: ficinia dunensis
intro: Ficinia dunensis, also known as sea couch or dune sedge, is a species of sedge that is native to the coastal regions of Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ficinia dunensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing protection against infection. Ficinia dunensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies for its therapeutic properties.
